name: Dragon
phrases: roarrr — another thief for my hoard
pathetic little morsel
you DARE steal from MY hoard
I'll reduce you to ash and cinder
i have lived for a thousand years...maybe more
scales harder than any sword forged
No one visits just to say hi...
your bones will join my collection
inhale the inferno
you think to defeat me?
older than your legends...older than your gods
another coin for the hoard...another prize
adventurers taste delicious, crispy
your armor is matchsticks against my flame
every moment...I grow stronger
My scales do NOT like the new soap
my fire melts stone and steel alike
count yourself blessed I'm bored
THIS TREASURE IS MINE
...how many coins did I count yesterday
I smell your fear
did you think you could escape me
empires crumble to dust beneath my shadow
your greatest weapons are my toys
I'll incinerate you where you stand
my hoard is worth more than your world
centuries of hunger drive my fury
none have survived my wrath
I AM ETERNAL
your end comes swiftly, mortal
